query: SELECT 'Total animals' as metric, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM animals UNION ALL SELECT 'Active animals', COUNT(*) FROM animals WHERE isActive=1 UNION ALL SELECT 'Inactive animals', COUNT(*) FROM animals WHERE isActive=0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Sheep', COUNT(*) FROM animals WHERE speciesId=4 UNION ALL SELECT 'Goat', COUNT(*) FROM animals WHERE speciesId=3 UNION ALL SELECT 'Cow', COUNT(*) FROM animals WHERE speciesId=1 UNION ALL SELECT 'Dog', COUNT(*) FROM animals WHERE speciesId=2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Born animals', COUNT(*) FROM animals WHERE acquisitionType='born' UNION ALL SELECT 'Animals with dam', COUNT(*) FROM animals WHERE damId IS NOT NULL;
